chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.S-550 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.4930/2024 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case ------------------------ 01.10.2025 Ms. Arjumand Khan, advocate for petitioner Mr. Umar Farooq, advocate for respondent ----------------------- Learned counsel for respondent has produced a copy of order dated 13th December, 2024, passed by the Honourable Supreme Court in Civil Miscellaneous Application No.10986/2024 (Humaira Fatima & Another versus Raja Nadir Javed), which is taken on record. Relevant portion of the aforesaid Order is reproduced below: “Therefore, the Guardian & Wards Case No.6288/2019 is withdrawn from the Guardian Court-III, Lahore and entrusted to the Senior Civil Judge, Malir at Karachi, who shall assign it to a Court of competent jurisdiction for proceeding in accordance with law. The application is allowed. Office is directed to dispatch a copy of this order to the respondent for information.” In view of the above mentioned order, instant petition has become infructuous and liable to be dismissed as such. It appears that in addition to G & W Application No.6288/2019 (newly numbered as G & W 49/2025), G & W No.32/2021 and Family Suit No.90/2021, involving the same parties are also pending before the Family Court-III, Malir Karachi. Parties are at liberty to move proper applications before the said Court to expedite the proceedings. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
